warrens-thinning.name: Thin the Warrens
warrens-thinning.description: Maeve needs the warren rats culled — and their meat for the inn's pot.

start.offerText: "The rats are breeding fast in the warren below. Cull the brood and bring me the meat — the pot's been thin all week, and I'll pay you in hot food and shards."

steps.text: Cull 5 giant rats in the warren
Bring 5 cuts of rat meat to Maeve

vespers-caps.name: Caps for the Mage
vespers-caps.description: Vesper needs glowing witchglow caps from the deep clusters for her glimmer-work.

start.offerText: Vesper looks up from her bench. "Headed down into the dark? Then do me a turn — witchglow caps grow on the clusters below, dripping that cold green light. Pick me a few and bring them back; I render their glow into my work, and I pay for the trouble."

steps.text: Pick 3 witchglow caps from a witchglow cluster
Bring the witchglow caps to Vesper

glimmer-for-vesper.name: A Shard of Light
glimmer-for-vesper.description: A whole glimmer crystal is a rare find — Vesper would give much to study one intact.

start.offerText: The crystal pulses with trapped light, whole and uncracked — a rare thing to pull from the dark unbroken. Vesper the glimmer-mage would give a great deal to study one like this.

steps.text: Bring the glimmer crystal to Vesper in the Mage's Shed

wick-stalker.name: Something in the Pens
wick-stalker.description: Something is killing Wick's stonebugs and dragging them off — and it must be denning somewhere close to the stockpens.

start.offerText: "I'm losing stonebugs," Wick says, low and angry. "Not to the pot — to whatever's been getting into the pens at night. Three this week, dragged clean off, nothing left but cracked shell. It's denning somewhere close, I'd swear it. Go and search the ground around the pens — the dead yard out east, the back corners, anywhere a thing could squeeze in. Find it, kill it, and I'll teach you to brew your own light for the trouble."

steps.text: Search the ground around the stockpens and kill whatever has been taking Wick's stonebugs

fenn-quiet-claim.name: Quiet Too Long
fenn-quiet-claim.description: A seam on the fourth level is registered to one Marl Wender, three seasons quiet. Fenn's ledger wants certainty before he crosses the name out.

start.offerText: Fenn opens the chained ledger to a page near the back and taps a name underlined twice. "Wender, M. A seam on the fourth level, three seasons quiet. The ledger wants certainty before I cross a man out. Every registered delver wears a claim-tag below — find his, wherever he ended, and lay it on this counter. Start where the water ends up. The lake keeps most of what the deep takes."

steps.text: Find Marl Wender's claim-tag, wherever the deep left him
Lay the claim-tag on Fenn's counter

board-crawler-bounty.name: Bounty: Crawlers on the Descent
board-crawler-bounty.description: The traders pay a standing bounty on the pale crawlers that hunt the dim margins below the descent.

start.offerText: A posting in Fenn's careful copy-hand: "BOUNTY, STANDING. The pale crawlers work the dim margins off the First Dark and take the new-come and the wounded — and the lurkers drop on them from the dark overhead. Seven crawlers and three lurkers culled keeps the descent passable a while. Payment on the traders' purse."

steps.text: Cull 3 cave lurkers below the descent

board-tallow-order.name: Standing Order: Tallow
board-tallow-order.description: Garrick renders bug-tallow into lamp-oil and pays a flat rate for lumps of it, no questions asked.

start.offerText: A posting gone translucent with grease at one corner: "STANDING ORDER. Bug-tallow, by the lump, flat rate — the lamps don't fill themselves. Bring it to Garrick at the market stall. Don't haggle. He won't."

steps.text: Bring 10 lumps of bug-tallow to Garrick

heart-of-the-dark.name: The Heart of the Dark
heart-of-the-dark.description: A shadow-heart, cut cold from the Starving Dark — deep-folk's work, not the surface's. Mallki, the Umbral trader by the river, is the one who would understand it.

start.offerText: The shadow-heart sits cold and restless in your pack, drinking the light off your fingers. This is no surface trophy — it is deep-folk's matter, and Mallki, the qhatuq by the river, is the one who would know the binding of it.

steps.text: Carry the shadow-heart to Mallki by the river

smiths-hammer.name: The Tinker's Hammer
smiths-hammer.description: A rusted hammer from the deep, struck with the Rim smith's own maker's mark. Tobin would want this back.

start.offerText: Under the rust, a maker's mark — and you have seen it before, stamped into half the gear on the Craftsmen's Row. This is Tobin's mark. The tinker-smith struck this hammer, and someone carried it down into the dark and never brought it home. He would want it back.

steps.text: Carry the rusted hammer to Tobin on the Craftsmen's Row

kings-shell.name: The King's Shell
kings-shell.description: The Pale King's carapace is armour enough for a delver, if it can be worked — and the surface has no smith who would know where to begin. Mallki, the Umbral trader, works the deep's own shell, and would want to see a kingshell plate.

start.offerText: The kingshell plate is heavy as a shield and harder, apex shell crusted with raw glimmer — armour, if a hand that knew the deep's craft could work it. Mallki, the qhatuq by the river, is that hand.

steps.text: Bring the kingshell plate to Mallki by the river

mallki-lost-blade.name: The Blade He Lost
mallki-lost-blade.description: Mallki lost an old deep-stone blade on a climb toward the surface. He is sentimental about it, and would have it back.

start.offerText: Mallki turns a glimmer-lamp low and is quiet a moment. "Once I carried a blade up toward your sun, yaku-runa — deep-stone, glimmer-veined, shaped by my own hand. The dark took it from me on the climb, somewhere near the rim, and I have not gone up to look. I am... fond of it." His lightless eyes settle on you. "Bring it back to me, and I will shape you one of your own. A better one."

steps.text: Find Mallki's lost blade, somewhere up near the rim
Return the blade to Mallki by the river

fenn-forged-tally.name: The Forged Tally
fenn-forged-tally.description: A seam east of the rat-warren is being worked by an outlaw crew keeping their own forged claims-tally on it. Fenn wants the man who runs them stopped and the false tally brought in to strike the claim.

start.offerText: Fenn sets down his pen. "There's a seam east of the rat-warren that shows on no page of mine, and a man down there keeping his own tally on it — a claim-number, a yield, a claim-mark, all in a hand that never crossed this counter. A forged account is still an account, and I have seen ground bought and sold on less. I can't send Hale below the gate, and the traders' board won't post a thing with no bounty behind it. So I'll put it to you. Put an end to the one they call the Foreman, and lay his false tally on my counter — I'll strike the claim from consideration, and see you paid for the trouble."

steps.text: Kill the Foreman, who holds the jumped claim east of the warren
Lay the forged tally on Fenn's counter
